name: codex-with-cursor
description: A Codex plugin for delegating Codex child-agent work to Cursor Agent CLI with workflow artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plugin for the Cursor Agent delegation workflow.
interface.longDescription: Routes Codex main thread planning into staged Codex child-agent execution that is handed off to Cursor Agent CLI with workflow/task/run artifacts. Install from this repository via codex plugin install.
defaultPrompt: Use the codex-with-cursor workflow to delegate child-agent implementation through Cursor Agent CLI.
Review this repository and explain how Codex main thread planning flows into workflow/task/run Cursor Agent CLI execution.
Install codex-with-cursor from the repository with codex plugin install for user scope.
